subcodes.first_line: O My Name Mihdi! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness! The letter of his honor Samandar, which he sent unto thee, hath attained unto Our presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی مهدی علیک بهائی و عنایتی نامه جناب سمندر که بانجناب ارسال نموده بحضور
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @zeal and fervor in teaching the Cause
